product_updates.title: On the stand, Elon Musk can’t escape his own tweets
product_updates.content: Elon Musk took the stand for the second day for his attempt to legally dismantle OpenAI.

product_updates.title: Meta is still burning money on AR/VR
product_updates.content: Meta is losing billions on Reality Labs each quarter, and its AI expenditures are only going to increase its spending.

product_updates.title: Satya Nadella says he’s ready to ‘exploit’ the new OpenAI deal
product_updates.content: Microsoft gets to offer OpenAI's tech to its cloud customers and doesn't have to pay for it. "We fully plan to exploit it," Nadella said.

product_updates.title: Microsoft says it has over 20M paid Copilot users, and they really are using it
product_updates.content: Despite the lingering perception that no one really uses Copilot, Microsoft said on Wednesday that the number of users and engagement is growing.

product_updates.title: Google Cloud surpasses $20B, but says growth was capacity-constrained
product_updates.content: Google Cloud topped $20B in quarterly revenue for the first time, fueled by surging demand for AI. But capacity constraints mean it could have grown even faster.

product_updates.title: Google gains 25M subscriptions in Q1, driven by YouTube and Google One
product_updates.content: Google added 25M paid subscriptions in Q1, reaching 350M total, as YouTube and Google One grow.

product_updates.title: Is AI video just a prequel? Runway’s CEO thinks world models are next
product_updates.content: AI-generated video has gone from novelty to creative tool almost overnight, and Runway has a front row seat to the shift. The New York-based company has raised close to $860 million at a $5.3 billion valuation, and its models are going toe-to-toe with the most well-funded labs in the world, inclu…

product_updates.title: Parallel Web Systems hits $2B valuation five months after its last big raise
product_updates.content: The AI agent-tool startup founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal has raised $100 million, led by Sequoia, months after raising a previous $100 million.

product_updates.title: Google Photos uses AI to make the iconic closet from ‘Clueless’ a reality
product_updates.content: Google says the new feature will leverage AI technology to automatically create a copy of your wardrobe that's based on the pieces of clothing appearing in your Google Photos library.

product_updates.title: More Gemini features are coming to Google TV
product_updates.content: Google TV just got more Gemini features, including the ability to transform photos and videos with tools Nano Banana and Veo.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: storing nuclear waste and orchestrating agents
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. It’s time to make a plan for nuclear waste Today, nuclear energy enjoys rare support across the political spectrum. Public approval has spiked, and Big Tech is…

technical_breakthroughs.title: Why a recent supply-chain attack singled out security firms Checkmarx and Bitwarden
technical_breakthroughs.content: Security firms find themselves especially exposed.

technical_breakthroughs.title: It’s time to make a plan for nuclear waste
technical_breakthroughs.content: Today, nuclear energy enjoys a rare moment of support across the political spectrum in the US. Interest from tech companies that are scrambling to meet demand for massive data centers has sparked a resurgence of money and attention in the industry. That newfound interest is exactly why it’s time …
